svg.title: India's internet users by geography (2024)
svg.desc: India's internet users by geography (2024). Source: IAMAI-Kantar Internet in India Report 2024. Based on ICUBE 2024 study covering over 90,000 households; urban/rural classification as defined by the survey.

text.style: font: 10px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Source: IAMAI-Kantar Internet in India Report 2024 — Based on ICUBE 2024 study covering over 90,000 households; urban/rural classification as defined by the survey.
